2606.24579.title: Cross-Lingual Exploration for Parametric Knowledge
2606.24579.paper_summary: Parametric knowledge in Large Language Models is not equally accessible across languages. As a result, standard inference techniques often struggle to surface localized facts, leading to failures in cross-lingual knowledge transfer and consistency. In this work, we investigate techniques for accessing hidden factual knowledge by exploring cross-lingual prompting strategies. We identify four inherent dimensions of cross-lingual exploration that directly govern parametric knowledge retrieval and evaluate them on multilingual factual benchmarks covering 17 typologically diverse languages. Our results demonstrate that cross-lingual exploration significantly improves knowledge transfer and factual recall, representing a more efficient compute Pareto frontier than native-language scaling. Furthermore, we observe corresponding improvements in cross-lingual consistency, exceeding what can be explained by accuracy gains alone. Overall, our work establishes multilingual prompt exploration as a highly effective inference-time strategy for unlocking latent parametric knowledge.
2606.24579.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型中的參數知識在不同語言之間並不平等可及。<lb/>因此，標準推理技術常常難以顯現本地化事實，導致跨語言知識轉移和一致性失敗。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們探討了通過探索跨語言提示策略來訪問隱藏事實知識的技術。<lb/>我們確定了四個本質的跨語言探索維度，這些維度直接影響參數知識檢索，並在涵蓋17種類型學上多樣化語言的多語言事實基準上對其進行評估。<lb/>我們的結果顯示，跨語言探索顯著改善了知識轉移和事實回憶，代表了一個比母語擴展更有效的計算Pareto邊界。<lb/>此外，我們觀察到跨語言一致性也有相應的改善，超過了僅由準確性提升所能解釋的範圍。<lb/>總體而言，我們的工作確立了多語言提示探索作為一種高度有效的推理時策略，用於解鎖潛在的參數知識。
2606.24579.author: Elisha Diskind et.al.
2606.24579.authors: Elisha Diskind, Itamar Trainin, Uri Shaham, Leshem Choshen, Idan Szpektor, Omri Abend
